title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery's JobPilot tutorial demonstrates a full-stack AI job application platform built in 2026, emphasizing system design around AI agents rather than manual coding. The workflow includes nine context files, five open-source agent skills, and integrations with InsForge, Browserbase, PostHog, and Adzuna API to prevent agent drift and enable reliable project shipping.
